children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter preempts or affects State water law or an interstate compact governing water.

children.heading: Compliance required
children.label: b Compliance required
children.text: The Secretary shall comply with State water laws in carrying out this subchapter. Nothing in this subchapter affects or preempts State water law or an interstate compact governing water.
